page.title: Stream restoration and land cover studies from a local field course.
page.description: Five interconnected projects examining FCC restoration sites, covering project scoping, land cover classification, group final results, a standalone quantitative analysis, and a field data collection exercise at Whispering Pines.

section.heading: Five related field studies
section.description: Each study has its own case study page with full methodology, process, and outcomes.

items.title: Quantifying Local Stream Restoration
items.imageAlt: ArcGIS Story Map: Quantifying Local Stream Restoration
items.summary: An introductory ArcGIS Story Map outlining the goals, study context, and proposed approach for quantifying local stream restoration outcomes, produced before data collection and analysis were complete.
items.note: Story map authoring, project scoping, science communication

items.title: Stream Health & Land Cover Classification
items.imageAlt: Detailed project poster for the Elk Creek stream health land cover classification study
items.summary: Multi-temporal land cover classification for a stream-health study using machine-learning pixel classification on satellite imagery, with accuracy assessment and documented cartographic outputs.
items.note: Remote sensing, ML classification, accuracy assessment, GIS analysis

items.title: Quantifying Local Stream Restoration: Final Results
items.imageAlt: ArcGIS Story Map: Quantifying Local Stream Restoration Final Results
items.summary: The final ArcGIS Story Map presenting the completed analysis, real data, and findings after data collection was complete.
items.note: Story map authoring, spatial analysis, science communication

items.title: Measuring a Comeback at Elk Creek
items.imageAlt: ArcGIS Story Map: Measuring a Comeback at Elk Creek
items.summary: A standalone story map presenting GIS and remote sensing measurements of stream sinuosity, woody structure stability, and riparian land cover change at Elk Creek between 2023 and 2025, one year after restoration began.
items.note: Solo project. Story map authoring, sinuosity analysis, woody structure mapping, ML land cover classification, change detection

items.title: Whispering Pines Field Survey
items.imageAlt: ArcGIS Field Maps screenshot from the Whispering Pines site visit
items.summary: A site visit and field data collection exercise at Whispering Pines, an FCC restoration site north of Ghose Lake. Recorded vegetation, stream features, land cover, and woody infrastructure using ArcGIS Field Maps.
items.note: Field data collection, site survey, feature recording
